name: Gift of Thorns

abilities.name: Made to Kill
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model is placed, it may declare a /// action after resolving the current action.

abilities.name: Undeserving Land Dwellers
abilities.text: This model may only be summoned if this crew's leader has the Banished keyword.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: The Joining
actions.effects: Attach a Wreathed upgrade to the target, then kill this model.

extraction_notes: Characteristics listed as 'Peon (3), Living' - the (3) indicates model_limit of 3 for the Peon characteristic
